what_this_enables: Automating actions on records when triggers fire or when properties change.

decision_criteria.workflow_vs_list: Use workflows when automated actions or property updates need to occur upon trigger events. Use lists when segmentation without execution is needed.
decision_criteria.re_enrollment: Enable re-enrollment when property updates should continually re-trigger automated logic.

location_in_hubspot.navigation: Automation → Workflows → Create workflow → From scratch

manual_trigger.purpose: Workflow runs only when manually started; useful for testing or one-off enrollments

filter_based_trigger.purpose: Records enroll when their property values match specified filter criteria

scheduled_trigger.purpose: Re-evaluates eligible records on a recurring schedule

data_event_trigger.purpose: Fires when data is created, changed, or meets conditions
data_event_trigger.expansion_scope_for_poc: not used in current use cases — documented but not detailed

branch.purpose: Conditional logic — different paths based on values

actions.purpose: Edit, copy, or clear CRM property values
Increment/decrement a number property by a specified amount
Create a follow-up task associated with the record
Create a new record (deal, ticket, etc.) — used for pipeline auto-creation
Email a HubSpot user (typically the record owner)

re_enrollment_configuration.configured_via: Details link in the trigger panel after trigger is set up
re_enrollment_configuration.decision_guidance: Enable for ongoing recalculation. Disable for one-time changes or to preserve manual overrides.

expansion_scope_not_covered: Currently documents only the actions needed for the Acme design document workflows (6.1 At-Risk Alert and 6.2 Renewal Pipeline). NOT documented: AI actions, all communication actions beyond email/Slack, enrichment, association management, deletion, communication subscriptions, connected app actions. Add sections as use cases require.
